entry.title: 8-K - APPLE INC (AAPL) (Filer) — Item 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers
entry.summary: Item 5.02 Departure of Directors or Certain Officers; Election of Directors; Appointment of Certain Officers.

entry.title: 8-K - NVIDIA CORP (NVDA) (Filer) — Item 2.01 Completion of Acquisition or Disposition of Assets
entry.summary: Item 2.01 Completion of Acquisition or Disposition of Assets. NVIDIA completes acquisition of Run:ai Labs for $700M.

entry.title: 8-K - TESLA INC (TSLA) (Filer) — Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition
entry.summary: Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition. Q1 2026 earnings release.
